implementation_summary.summary: CP00-681 bridges the RP22 External Integrations I P05 closeout tail into the P06 scope inventory head over 150 planned units from RP22.P05.M03.S19 through RP22.P06.M00.S06. It covers P05 closeout, secondary workflow, permission/audit, synthetic fixture, test/golden, Hermes evidence, Claude review, handoff, and P06 scope inventory decision-binding rows while keeping runtime paths closed.

plan_binding_snapshot.title: CP00-681 RP22.P05.M03.S19-RP22.P06.M00.S06 generated_from_weighted_implementation_ledger
plan_binding_snapshot.renumbering_policy: Pack IDs are monotonic after the latest live closeout pack. If a requested locked queue skips live-open ledger units, live-open units are inserted first and requested packs are shifted with correction_reason.
